summary: Comprehensive testing of TokenLens Settings page - AI provider connection functionality completed successfully. All provider CRUD operations, UI interactions, and navigation features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Minor console warnings about chart dimensions in dashboard, but does not affect Settings functionality

passed_tests: Settings page loads and displays correctly
All 5 supported providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Cohere, Mistral) are shown
Add Provider dialog opens and shows available provider options
Provider selection displays instructions and API key input field
Added provider appears in Connected Providers list with masked API key
Provider removal updates UI and shows success toast notification
Navigation to Settings from top navigation bar works correctly
Provider instructions accordion expands and shows setup steps
API key input field accepts values and validates
Connect Provider button processes requests correctly
Remove provider buttons are functional with proper confirmation
All authentication and authorization working properly
Backend validation for invalid providers and missing API keys
Error handling for non-existent provider removal

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI interactions and navigation working
